productDisplayName: Nike Men Swift FG Grey Sports Shoe
description: Enhance your performance during your soccer game with this Firm Ground nike Swift FG shoe. Created using PVC-free synthetic leather and lightweight conical studs, this shoe a great buy.UpperSoft, flexible PVC-free household synthetic leather upperLacing system for a supportive Fit and to lock the foot in place Meshed and padded inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortSmooth rounded toe region for better ball feelMidsolePU midsole for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced impact protectionHigh density, die-cut reused Avoi sockliner for all-day comfortOutsoleLightweight TPU denture with conical studs on the ball of the foot for absolute grip and traction on firm groundsBladed studs on the heel for optimum grip and reduction in stud pressureShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
